title: TC-CCL-001: CCL Settings Lock/Unlock Transition When Call Ends (Voyager Free 60+)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap [Voyager Free 60+] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL (Call Comfort Level) settings.
Set CCL to a mid-range value (e.g., 50).
Exit Audio Settings and return to the Home screen.
Place an active outgoing call from the phone (or receive an incoming call).
While the call is active, return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Observe that CCL sliders/buttons are locked and greyed out.
End the call from the phone dialer.
Immediately (within 2 seconds) return to the CCL settings screen in the app.
Observe the CCL UI state.
expected: After the call ends, CCL settings should unlock and return to their previous state (value 50) within 2 seconds. The UI should NOT show any flickering, blinking, or momentary greyed-out/locked state. The slider should be interactive and display the previously set value of 50 without any visual instability.

title: TC-CCL-002: CCL UI State at Exact Moment of Call Connection (Surround 80)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap [Surround 80] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Set CCL to value 75.
Minimize the app (press Home button).
From a second phone, call the phone connected to Surround 80.
Answer the incoming call on the connected phone.
While the call is connecting (during the ring-to-connected transition), immediately foreground the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap [Surround 80] → Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Observe the CCL UI continuously for 5 seconds.
End the call and repeat steps 3-10 two more times.
expected: At the exact moment the call connects, the CCL settings should transition smoothly from unlocked to locked/greyed-out state. There should be NO blinking, flickering, or rapid toggling between locked and unlocked states. The transition should be instantaneous and stable. This behavior should be consistent across 3 consecutive attempts.

title: TC-CCL-003: CCL Settings During Call Waiting / Call Hold (Voyager Free 60+)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap [Voyager Free 60+] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Set CCL to value 30.
Place Call A from the connected phone.
While Call A is active, observe CCL settings are locked/greyed out.
Receive an incoming Call B (call waiting).
While Call B is ringing (Call A on hold), observe the CCL settings screen.
Answer Call B (putting Call A on hold).
Observe CCL settings during the call swap transition.
Swap back to Call A (putting Call B on hold).
Observe CCL settings during the second swap.
End both calls.
Observe CCL settings after all calls end.
expected: CCL settings should remain locked and greyed out during ALL call states: active call, call waiting, call on hold, and during call swap transitions. There should be NO blinking or flickering at any point. After both calls end, CCL settings should unlock and return to value 30 without any visual instability.

title: TC-CCL-004: CCL Settings During Active Call + App Background/Foreground Cycle (Sync 20)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap [Sync 20] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Set CCL to value 40.
Place an active call from the connected phone.
While call is active, foreground the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Verify CCL settings are locked and greyed out.
Press Home button to background the app.
Wait 10 seconds.
Re-open Poly Studio Mobile app from the app switcher (not from cold start).
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Observe CCL UI state for 5 seconds.
While still on the CCL screen, background the app again.
Wait 30 seconds.
Foreground the app again from app switcher.
Observe CCL UI state for 5 seconds.
End the call.
Observe CCL UI state immediately after call ends.
expected: CCL settings should remain locked and greyed out consistently across all app background/foreground cycles while the call is active. There should be NO blinking, flickering, or momentary unlocking when the app is restored from background. The locked state should be stable and persistent. After the call ends, CCL settings should unlock and return to value 40.

title: TC-CCL-005: CCL Settings During Active Call + App Force-Kill and Relaunch (Voyager Free 60+)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap [Voyager Free 60+] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Set CCL to value 60.
Place an active call from the connected phone.
While call is active, foreground the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Verify CCL settings are locked and greyed out.
Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe from recent apps or Settings → Apps → Force Stop).
Wait 5 seconds.
Relaunch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap [Voyager Free 60+] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Observe CCL UI state for 10 seconds.
End the call.
Observe CCL UI state after call ends.
expected: After app force-kill and relaunch while a call is active, the CCL settings screen should load with CCL settings locked and greyed out. There should be NO blinking, flickering, or temporary unlocked state during the initial rendering of the CCL screen. After the call ends, CCL settings should unlock and display the previously set value of 60 (or the default value if state was not persisted across kill). The transition should be stable with no visual artifacts.

title: TC-CCL-006: CCL Settings Value Persistence After Call Ends — Verify No Reset (Surround 80)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap [Surround 80] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Set CCL to a non-default value (e.g., 80).
Take a screenshot of the CCL value.
Exit to Home screen.
Place an active call from the connected phone (duration: 2 minutes).
During the call, do NOT open the app.
End the call.
Wait 5 seconds.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap [Surround 80] → Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Observe the CCL value displayed.
Compare with the screenshot taken in step 5.
Repeat steps 1-14 two more times with different CCL values (e.g., 20 and 50).
expected: After the call ends, the CCL settings should display the SAME value that was set before the call (80, 20, 50 respectively). The value should NOT reset to default. The UI should be stable with no blinking or flickering. The slider should be interactive and show the correct persisted value on all 3 attempts.

title: TC-CCL-007: Rapid Call State Transitions — CCL UI Stability (Voyager Free 60+)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap [Voyager Free 60+] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Set CCL to value 45.
Keep the CCL settings screen visible on the phone.
From a second phone, rapidly place and end calls to the connected phone (call → answer → hang up) 5 times in quick succession (each call lasting ~3 seconds).
During each call transition (ringing → connected → ended), observe the CCL UI continuously.
After the 5th call ends, observe the CCL UI for 10 seconds.
Interact with the CCL slider to verify it is functional.
expected: During all 5 rapid call transitions, the CCL UI should transition cleanly between locked (during call) and unlocked (after call ends) states. There should be NO blinking, flickering, or visual instability at any transition point. After all calls end, the CCL slider should be fully interactive and display value 45 without any delay or visual artifacts.

title: TC-CCL-008: CCL Settings During Multi-Party Conference Call (Surround 80)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap [Surround 80] from the device list.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Set CCL to value 70.
Initiate a 3-way conference call from the connected phone (Call A + Call B merged).
While the conference call is active, foreground the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Experience → CCL settings.
Observe CCL UI state for 10 seconds.
While observing, have one participant leave the conference call.
Observe CCL UI during the participant drop.
End the conference call.
Observe CCL UI state after call ends.
expected: CCL settings should remain locked and greyed out during the entire multi-party conference call, including during the participant drop transition. There should be NO blinking or flickering. After the conference call ends, CCL settings should unlock and return to value 70 without any visual instability.
